NAVAREA XIX 117/21
 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 121830 UTC SEP 21
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 72-26.3N 020-07.3E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 71-15.6N 022-15.6E SCARABEO 8
 65-58.6N 007-43.1E WEST HERCULES
 65-23.0N 007-22.0E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 65-22.3N 007-21.4E AKOFS SEAFARER

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　109/21
